metadata.title: Moldy - AI Agent Builder
metadata.description: Create, chat with, and schedule AI agents.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Enter your account details.
login.rememberMeTooltip: You currently stay signed in by default.

register.title: Sign up
register.subtitle: Create your Moldy account.
register.name: Display name
register.nameHelp: You do not need to enter your legal name.
register.terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy (required).

strength.label: Password strength
strength.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

hero.socialProof: 200+ teams are building agents with Moldy
hero.loginSubtitle: Continue building your agents or start a new idea.
hero.registerSubtitle: Ready-to-use templates and tools are waiting for you.

features.security: Encrypted API keys and safe tool calls

errors.emailTaken: This email is already in use.
errors.accountLocked: Your account is temporarily locked. Try again in 15 minutes.
errors.accountInactive: This account is inactive. Contact an administrator.
errors.rateLimit: Please try again in a moment.
errors.serverError: Please try again in a moment. If the problem persists, contact an administrator.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Moldy
onboarding.subtitle: You're almost ready to build AI agents.
onboarding.body: Register an LLM API key to create AI agents.
onboarding.encryptedNote: Keys are encrypted at rest and visible only to you.

dashboard.subtitle: Create AI agents to automate recurring work.
dashboard.subtitleWithCount: Create AI agents to automate recurring work. You currently have {count} agents.

conversational.label: Build by Chat
conversational.description: Configure an agent through conversation with AI.

manual.label: Build Manually
manual.description: Set prompts, models, and tools yourself.

template.label: Use a Template
template.description: Start quickly from a ready-made template.

empty.title: Create your first agent
empty.description: Choose how you want to start from the cards above.

dashboard.tip: Tip: Templates help you get started faster.

hero.title: What do you want to build?
hero.subtitle: Describe it in natural language, and Moldy will suggest tools, models, and triggers step by step.

new.chatPlaceholder: Example: Search for news about my tracked keywords every morning at 8 and send it to Slack.

items.label: Daily morning news brief for tracked keywords
items.text: Every morning at 8, search for AI and semiconductor news and summarize the highlights in three lines.

items.label: Automatic GitHub PR review
items.text: When a new PR is opened, review the diff and comment on convention issues, possible bugs, and missing tests.

items.label: Competitor price monitoring
items.text: Crawl competitor product pages once a day and notify Slack when prices change.

items.label: Customer inquiry classification
items.text: Classify incoming email as refund, technical, or general inquiries, and draft replies for refunds.

items.label: Meeting notes to action items
items.text: Turn meeting notes into key decisions and action items with owners and due dates.

items.label: Nearby restaurant curation
items.text: Recommend highly rated restaurants near me by category, including hours and distance.

manual.title: Build Manually
manual.description: Configure prompts, models, and tools manually

template.subtitle: Choose a proven template and create your first agent in 30 seconds.

search.placeholder: Search by template name, description, or tool...

sort.name: Name
sort.ariaLabelNewest: Currently sorted by newest. Click to sort by name.
sort.ariaLabelName: Currently sorted by name. Click to sort by newest.

noSearchResults.title: No templates match "{query}"
noSearchResults.subtitle: Try another keyword or build one through conversation.

bottomCta.title: Can't find the right template?
bottomCta.subtitle: Build one through conversation or configure it from scratch.

creation.initialQuestion: What kind of agent do you want to build?
creation.initialPlaceholder: Example: "An agent that summarizes Hancom news every day"

error.sessionFailed: Could not start the build session. Please try again.
error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

creation.cancelDescription: Current progress will not be saved.

conversational.welcomeTitle: Create an Agent with Natural Language
conversational.welcomeDescription: Describe the agent you want in natural language. We'll build it together in eight steps: intent analysis, tool recommendations, middleware, system prompt, and image generation.
conversational.example: Example: "Create an agent that searches the web" or "Create an agent that sends stock prices every morning at 9."

settings.unsavedWarning: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
settings.title: Agent Settings: {name}
settings.name: Name

identity.title: Credential Usage
identity.description: Choose whose credentials this agent uses at runtime.

perUser.title: Per user
perUser.description: Chat runs use each caller's credentials.

fixed.title: Agent fixed
fixed.description: Scheduled runs use the owner's credentials.

subAgents.title: Subagents
subAgents.manageDescription: Add or remove subagents this agent can delegate work to.

toolsSkills.title: Tools & Skills
toolsSkills.noSkills: No skills registered. Add one from {link}.

settings.openerMaxReached: You can add up to {max} openers.
settings.noTools: No tools registered. Add one from {link}.
settings.noSkills: No skills registered. Add one from {link}.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Dialog
deleteDialog.description: This agent and its conversations will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

channels.hint: Configure where this agent can communicate.

addToolsDialog.description: Choose tools this agent can use.

addSkillsDialog.description: Choose skills this agent can use.

canvas.hint: Drag nodes to shape your agent visually.

error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.description: Use chat to modify this agent configuration.

error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

schedule.title: Schedules
schedule.description: Create automated runs for this agent.

resultStorage.title: Result storage
resultStorage.description: Choose where scheduled run results are saved.

scheduleCenter.title: Schedules
scheduleCenter.description: View and manage scheduled agent runs across your workspace.

empty.description: Schedules you create from agent settings will appear here.

delete.title: Delete
delete.description: This schedule will stop running. Existing conversations and run history will remain.

share.title: Share
share.description: Anyone with this link can view the shared conversation.

rightRail.noHeadings: No headings detected in this message.
rightRail.subagentPending: Sub-agent execution detail will appear here as it streams.

witty.0: One moment, booting up my brain...
witty.17: Hold on, a good idea just arrived...
witty.26: Drawing from the well of inspiration...

deleteDialog.title: Delete Dialog
deleteDialog.description: This conversation will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

page.description: Manage tools agents can use, including built-ins, custom tools, and MCP tools.

authDialog.description: Select the credential this tool should use.

auth.description: Select credentials for this MCP server.

page.description: Connect MCP servers and import their tools into Moldy.

empty.title: Empty
empty.description: Add an MCP server to discover external tools.

importDialog.description: Review discovered tools before importing them.

toast.savedToggleLater: Server saved. Enable {count} tools later from the detail view.

wizard.title: Wizard
wizard.description: Add a server, verify the connection, and choose tools to enable.

detailDialog.credentialBindingsDescription: Choose the credential this skill should use when it runs. Changes apply from the next run.

systemCredentials.description: Manage operator-owned credentials available to system resources.

operatorOnly.description: Only super users can manage system credentials.

systemLlm.description: Configure the default LLMs used by system workflows.

operatorOnly.title: Operator Only
operatorOnly.description: Only super users can manage system LLM settings.

text_fallback.description: Fallback model used when primary text generation fails.

skill.description: Create and manage reusable instructions and executable skill packages.

scratch.description: Start with an empty text skill.

catalog.description: Browse agents, tools, and skills shared through the marketplace.

empty.title: Empty
empty.description: No marketplace items match the current filters.

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.description: Review marketplace submissions and publication status.

denied.title: Denied
denied.description: You do not have permission to access moderation.

queueEmpty.title: Queue Empty
queueEmpty.description: There are no items waiting for review.

error.description: The marketplace item could not be loaded.

toast.installedNeedsSetup: Installed {name}. Finish setup before using it.

done.title: Done
done.description: The item is installed and ready to use.

publishWizard.description: Publish this resource to the marketplace.
publishWizard.aclSummary: Visible to {count} selected users or groups.

done.title: Done
done.description: Your marketplace item has been submitted.

overwrite.label: Overwrite my edits
overwrite.description: Replace the installed copy with the latest marketplace version.

install_new_copy.label: Install as a new copy
install_new_copy.description: Install the latest version as a separate copy.

keep_current.label: Keep current install
keep_current.description: Keep the currently installed version unchanged.

empty.description: Add a model to make it available to agents.

catalog.title: Models
catalog.description: Discover models from connected providers and register them.

addDialog.title: Add Dialog
addDialog.description: Register a model and configure pricing and capabilities.

footer.title: Footer
footer.description: Build and share no-code agents with tools and skills in Moldy.

error.title: Error
error.description: The link may have expired or sharing may have been disabled. Ask the author for a new link.

appSettings.title: App Settings
appSettings.description: Manage your account and Moldy preferences.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Choose how Moldy and your agents display and address you.
profile.profileSettingsDescription: You can change your display name and profile icon anytime.
profile.accountInfoDescription: This information comes from your Moldy login session.
profile.name: Name
profile.displayNameHelp: You do not need to enter your legal name. Agents use this for natural address.
profile.avatarDescription: Shown in chat and the lower-left user menu.

placeholder.title: Security settings coming soon
placeholder.description: Password changes and session management are coming soon.
placeholder.detail: Moldy currently uses session-based authentication. Detailed security controls will be added in a later step.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose the brightness mode for the app.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for Moldy.

agentApi.title: Agent API
agentApi.description: Prepare API deployments for calling Moldy agents from external apps.

placeholder.title: Agent API coming soon
placeholder.description: API deployments and keys for calling Moldy agents from external apps are coming soon.
placeholder.detail: This step only adds the menu and placeholder page. Deployment URLs and API key issuance will be implemented as a separate feature.

audit.title: My Activity Log
audit.description: Review changes, executions, failures, and denials tied to your account.
audit.adminDescription: Review audit events across every user in chronological order.

custom.description: Select the credential this custom tool should use.

prebuilt.description: Manage API keys for system tools such as Naver and Google.

custom.title: Custom
custom.description: Manage API keys that custom tools can reuse.

mcp.title: MCP
mcp.description: Connect MCP servers to import additional tools. Add new servers from the Tools page.

empty.description: Register API keys or auth details to reuse them in tools.
